message:
feat(conformance): add polynomial differential test suite with golden-value fixtures

Implement a comprehensive polynomial differential conformance suite
covering standard, Chebyshev, Legendre, Hermite, and Laguerre polynomial
operations:

- Add PolynomialDifferentialCase struct for deserialization of test
  fixtures with fields for operation, seed, mode, lhs/rhs/y values,
  degree, expected values/aux, tolerances, and sort flags
- Add run_polynomial_differential_suite runner following the same pattern
  as the FFT differential suite with mismatch collection and JSON report
  artifact generation
- Add execute_polynomial_differential_operation dispatcher (~250 lines)
  mapping operation strings to UFuncArray methods for polyval, polyfit,
  polyder, polyint, roots, poly, polymul, polyadd, polysub, polydiv,
  plus all cheb*/leg*/herm*/lag* family operations
- Add validate_polynomial_differential_expectation with tolerance-based
  comparison supporting single-array and pair (quotient+remainder)
  outcomes with optional sorted comparison
- Add 49 golden-value test cases in polynomial_differential_cases.json
  covering all polynomial families with explicit abs_tol/rel_tol
- Register suite in run_all_core_suites and add integration test

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
